zh.title: 分享 AivoClaw 给朋友
zh.subtitle: 复制下面这段文案分享给你的朋友或群聊，作者会非常感谢你哟😘
zh.body:
最近发现一个 OpenClaw 的一键安装包叫做 AivoClaw
几分钟就能装好并开始用

他们说 OpenClaw 可以做这些事：
• 浏览器操作：自动搜索浏览、定时信息抓取、处理汇总
• 内容创作：文案写作、生成 AI 图片
• 数据处理：处理 Excel 数据、制作图表
• 办公自动化：批量处理邮件、简历筛选、填写表单
• 会议助手：会前整理文件制作 PPT、会后快速生成纪要

低成本把内容、运营、办公、招聘自动化，可以下载试试：aivoclaw.cn
作者还建了反馈群，有什么问题都可以在群里反馈

en.title: Share AivoClaw with friends
en.subtitle: Copy this text and share it with your friends or group chats. The creator will really appreciate it 😘
en.body:
I recently found a one-click installer for OpenClaw called AivoClaw
You can get it installed and start using it in just a few minutes

People say OpenClaw can do these things:
• Browser automation: auto search and browsing, scheduled information capture, and summary processing
• Content creation: copywriting and AI image generation
• Data processing: Excel data handling and chart creation
• Office automation: batch email processing, resume screening, and form filling
• Meeting assistant: pre-meeting file prep and PPT creation, plus fast post-meeting minutes

If you want low-cost automation for content, operations, office work, and recruiting, try: aivoclaw.cn
The creator also set up a feedback group, so you can report any issues there
